title: Rondonanthus flabelliformis
taxonomy: Rondonanthus flabelliformis is a genus of flowering plant in the family Arecaceae. The classification of Rondonanthus flabelliformis places it within the order Arecales. It is native to Brazil and has been classified as an evergreen palm. The classification further places it in the class Liliopsida and the division Magnoliophyta. Rondonanthus flabelliformis is a unique and relatively rare species within the Arecaceae family.

The plant is valued for its potential health benefits, including its antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which are said to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues.
